name: latex-tectonic
description: Compile LaTeX and TeX documents with the bundled Tectonic engine.

interface.longDescription: LaTeX Tectonic adds a bundled Tectonic executable that Codex can use to compile LaTeX and TeX documents without relying on a system TeX install.
defaultPrompt: Compile this LaTeX file with Tectonic
Build a PDF from my TeX document
